questions.question: Explain the difference between internal and external commands in a UNIX system.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of internal and external commands.

questions.question: A user executes the command `ls -l` from the command line. Identify if the command is internal or external, and explain why.
questions.hint: Provide the command type and its characteristics.

questions.question: Write a synonyms for 'internal command' used in UNIX system.
questions.hint: Provide a single word or phrase that describes internal commands.
